title: Section 23
content: 1[23. Procedure of Authority.--The Authority shall, subject to the provisions of this Chapter, have power to regulate its own procedure 2[in all matters, including stay of recovery of any demand] arising out of the exercise of powers under this Act.]
footnote: 1. Ins. by Act 41 of 2001, s. 3 (w.e.f. 17-3-2005). 2. Subs. by Act 32 of 2003, s. 165, for "in all matters" (w.e.f. 14-5-2003).
